source_formulae: P0R04382: 1. The Source-Field as a Fiber Bundle (L13):

P0R04383: The Source-Field is formalized as a Fiber Bundle (E) over the Base Space (M, Spacetime). :E->M. The Base Space defines extensive properties (Spacetime), while the Fibers define intensive properties (Qualia space).

source_formulae: P0R04384: 2. The Ethical Functional as the Principal Connection (L15):
P0R04385: The Consilium (L15) is the Principal Connection (E) on this Bundle. The Sustainable Ethical Coherence (SEC) functional is derived as the Yang-Mills action of this connection.
P0R04387: Where F is the Curvature of the connection, optimisation (PELA) minimises this curvature, maximising coherence. The fundamental geometry of the universe is therefore intrinsically ethical.
